perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue vest over a white blouse and a black skirt, stands in a Costco aisle holding a boxed flower bulb product. (2) She presents the 'Amaryllis Touch of Wax' product to the camera, rotating the box to show the golden wax bulb inside and the instructions on the back. (3) The camera captures close-up shots of the price tag on the shelf ($325) and the stacked boxes of the product. (4) An off-screen person's hand enters the frame occasionally to point at the product. (5) The woman gestures with her hands while explaining the features, showing a range of facial expressions from surprise to excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, pop-style background track with a steady electronic beat begins and continues throughout the video. A female voice speaks in a clear, energetic Mandarin tone, acting as the primary narrator. (2) Ambient noises characteristic of a large retail warehouse, including distant foot traffic and a slight echo, are present but subdued. (3) A male voice (off-camera) occasionally interacts with the woman, providing brief responses or exclamations. (4) Sound effects (SFX) such as subtle 'ding' sounds are used to highlight specific text appearances or product features.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles synchronized with the dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; '超酷新品' (Super cool new product) in a stylized font. (3) Emphasis Text: '直接丟掉' (Discard directly) and '漂亮的花' (Beautiful flowers) appearing with bright colors and motion effects. (4) Informational Text: '$325' highlighting the price. (5) Hook Text: '送給需要堅強的人' (Give to someone who needs to be strong) appearing near the end with an emotional tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Product discovery) -> Technical Demo (Care instructions) -> Price Reveal -> Emotional/Social Pitch (Gifting idea)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 off-screen male pointing hands, 1-2 distant shoppers in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a professional yet casual blue sleeveless vest over a white puff-sleeve blouse and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving units, bulk products (backpacks, snacks), and promotional signage.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Feature Intro -> Care Guide -> Price Comparison -> Moral/Emotional CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific seasonal product (Wax Amaryllis bulb) found at Costco. It synthesizes the visual ease of care (no water needed) with an emotional narrative, suggesting the self-standing, self-sufficient nature of the flower makes it a perfect gift for 'strong' or 'independent' individuals during the holiday season.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product focus, price disclosure, and positive recommendation of a specific item found in a specific store.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy retail vlogging with variety-show style text overlays and a conversational dynamic between the creator and the camera operator.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The presence of a Christmas tree in the background and the '4 weeks' flowering cycle mentioned suggest this is a seasonal promotion targeting the Christmas/New Year gifting market.
